description_long: This awning features a long, gently curved canopy with a solid teal blue color and a subtle, semi-translucent appearance. The canopy's lower edge is finished with a scalloped trim, adding a decorative touch to its otherwise simple design. The structure appears to be made from a durable, weather-resistant material, likely reinforced fabric or polycarbonate, supported by a rigid internal frame. The underside is darker, suggesting either shadowing or a denser support structure. The awning is designed to be mounted horizontally, most likely above a window or storefront, providing shade and shelter from the elements. There are no visible logos, text, or branding, and the overall style is clean and modern.
description: A long, curved teal awning with a scalloped edge and a solid, modern appearance, designed for mounting above windows or storefronts.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the curved teal canopy and the scalloped lower edge.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thickness and gentle arch of the awning, with the scalloped trim visible at the bottom.
description_view_2: Bottom view highlighting the dark underside and the full length of the scalloped edge.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the arch and thickness of the awning.
attribute_mounting_location: wall-mounted above a window or storefront facade
